Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The task involves processing an event log in DuckDB to find process variants and filter events to only those from the top K variants based on frequency or significance

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The event log table named event_log contains key columns case_id activity and timestamp

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Process variants are defined as the ordered sequence of activities for each case sorted by timestamp

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: To identify variants first aggregate activities per case using STRING_AGG ordered by timestamp in a CTE or subquery

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Group cases by their activity sequences to count occurrences and identify unique variants

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Select the top K variants based on frequency then filter events to include only cases belonging to these variants

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Create a CTE named variants to aggregate activities per case using STRING_AGG ordered by timestamp grouping by case_id

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Use another CTE top_variants to count variant frequencies order by frequency and limit to top K treating K as a parameter

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Filter cases to include only those whose variants match the top K by joining or using IN with the top_variants CTE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Finally select from the event_log where case_id belongs to the filtered cases ensuring all events from relevant cases are included
